creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Tue Apr 29 05:57:28 2014
New Revision: 352576
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352576
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352576/

Log:
  - Fix build on i386
  - Enable sound support for all ARCH
  
  PR:		187494
  Submitted by:	ports fury

Modified:
  head/irc/scrollz/Makefile
  head/irc/scrollz/distinfo
  head/irc/scrollz/files/patch-Makefile.in
  head/irc/scrollz/files/patch-source-screen.c
  head/irc/scrollz/pkg-descr
  head/irc/scrollz/pkg-plist

Modified: head/irc/scrollz/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/irc/scrollz/Makefile	Tue Apr 29 05:56:20 2014	(r352575)
+++ head/irc/scrollz/Makefile	Tue Apr 29 05:57:28 2014	(r352576)
@@ -2,48 +2,47 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	scrollz
-PORTVERSION=	2.2.2
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	2.2.3
 CATEGORIES=	irc ipv6
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.netraam.net/scrollz/download/ \
-		http://www.scrollz.com/download/
+		http://www.scrollz.org/download/
 DISTNAME=	ScrollZ-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Enhanced ircII client that supports scripts, colors, and more
 
+LICENSE=	BSD
+LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/COPYRIGHT
+
 USES=		gmake iconv ncurses
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--enable-ipv6 --enable-regexp --enable-utf8
-MAKE_ENV=	IRCLIB="${PREFIX}/share/scrollz"
-
-PORTDATA=	*
 
-PLIST_SUB+=	SCROLLZ_VER="${PORTVERSION}"
+PLIST_SUB=	SCROLLZ_VER="${PORTVERSION}"
 
-OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	OPENSSL
 OPTIONS_RADIO=		SSL
 OPTIONS_RADIO_SSL=	GNUTLS OPENSSL
+OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	OPENSSL
 
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
-
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MGNUTLS}
-LIB_DEPENDS+=	libgnutls.so:${PORTSDIR}/security/gnutls
-CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-ssl=${LOCALBASE}
-.endif
-
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MOPENSSL}
-USE_OPENSSL=		yes
-CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-openssl=${OPENSSLBASE}
-.endif
+GNUTLS_LIB_DEPENDS=	libgnutls.so:${PORTSDIR}/security/gnutls
+GNUTLS_USES=		pkgconfig
+GNUTLS_CONFIGURE_ON=	--with-ssl
+OPENSSL_USE=		OPENSSL=yes
+OPENSSL_CONFIGURE_ON=	--with-openssl=${OPENSSLBASE}
 
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's/-liconv/${ICONV_LIB}/' ${WRKSRC}/configure
 
 pre-build:
 .if !defined(BATCH)
-	@(cd ${WRKSRC}; ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${CC} ${CFLAGS} -o SZdist SZdist.c)
-	@(cd ${WRKSRC}; ./SZdist)
+	@(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${CC} ${CFLAGS} -o SZdist \
+		SZdist.c)
+	@(cd ${WRKSRC} && ./SZdist)
 .endif
 
+post-install:
+.for i in scrollz-${PORTVERSION} wservz
+	@${STRIP_CMD} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/${i}
+.endfor
+
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

==============================================================================
--- head/irc/scrollz/distinfo	Tue Apr 29 05:56:20 2014	(r352575)
+++ head/irc/scrollz/distinfo	Tue Apr 29 05:57:28 2014	(r352576)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (ScrollZ-2.2.2.tar.gz) = f6547389d90008e5092314cbfb339aa7be532d89b5372fecd1602946ff2fa596
-SIZE (ScrollZ-2.2.2.tar.gz) = 940789
+SHA256 (ScrollZ-2.2.3.tar.gz) = 7d95d323168d117b6cb6e73fe1de85b863de7c681b5004545b6eceb76c208d03
+SIZE (ScrollZ-2.2.3.tar.gz) = 948958

Modified: head/irc/scrollz/files/patch-Makefile.in
==============================================================================
--- head/irc/scrollz/files/patch-Makefile.in	Tue Apr 29 05:56:20 2014	(r352575)
+++ head/irc/scrollz/files/patch-Makefile.in	Tue Apr 29 05:57:28 2014	(r352576)
@@ -19,6 +19,17 @@
  #   installflush	- installs ircflush
  #   installscript 	- installs the scripts
  #   installhelp		- installs the help files
+@@ -50,8 +50,8 @@
+ prefix = @prefix@
+ exec_prefix = @exec_prefix@
+ bindir = @bindir@
+-sharedir = @prefix@/share
+-mandir = @prefix@/share/man/man1
++sharedir = @datadir@
++mandir = @mandir@/man1
+ 
+ DESTDIR =
+ 
 @@ -105,7 +105,7 @@
  
  # This program allows you to use screen/xterm's to put new irc windows

Modified: head/irc/scrollz/files/patch-source-screen.c
==============================================================================
--- head/irc/scrollz/files/patch-source-screen.c	Tue Apr 29 05:56:20 2014	(r352575)
+++ head/irc/scrollz/files/patch-source-screen.c	Tue Apr 29 05:57:28 2014	(r352576)
@@ -1,18 +1,6 @@
 --- ./source/screen.c.orig	2011-04-29 03:21:18.000000000 -0500
 +++ ./source/screen.c	2013-07-13 07:45:53.092133202 -0500
-@@ -2000,7 +2000,10 @@
- 	{
- 		puts(incoming);
- 		fflush(stdout);
--		return;
-+/**************************** PATCHED by Flier ******************************/
-+		/*return;*/
-+        return NULL;
-+/****************************************************************************/
- 	}
- 	/* Handles output redirection first */
- 	if (!in_redirect && current_screen->redirect_name &&
-@@ -2416,6 +2419,10 @@
+@@ -2424,6 +2424,10 @@
  	{
  		screen_type = ST_SCREEN;
  	}
@@ -23,7 +11,7 @@
  	else if ((char *) 0 != (displayvar = getenv("DISPLAY")))
  	{
  		if ((char *) 0 == (termvar = getenv("TERM")))
-@@ -2454,6 +2461,7 @@
+@@ -2462,6 +2466,7 @@
  	say("Opening new %s...",
  		screen_type == ST_XTERM ?  "window" :
  		screen_type == ST_SCREEN ? "screen" :
@@ -31,7 +19,7 @@
  					   "wound" );
  	snprintf(sock.sun_path, sizeof sock.sun_path, "/tmp/irc_%08d_%x", (int) pid, mycycle);
  	sock.sun_family = AF_UNIX;
-@@ -2569,6 +2577,22 @@
+@@ -2577,6 +2582,22 @@
  			args[i] = NULL;
  			execvp(xterm, args);
  		}

Modified: head/irc/scrollz/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/irc/scrollz/pkg-descr	Tue Apr 29 05:56:20 2014	(r352575)
+++ head/irc/scrollz/pkg-descr	Tue Apr 29 05:57:28 2014	(r352576)
@@ -1,9 +1,11 @@
 ScrollZ is an IRC client based on ircII with many enhancements (colors,
-userlists, enhanced scripting, and more). The main difference from other
-clients is that it implements many useful features that you would normally find
-in a script, thus making it faster than such scripts paired up with ircII.
+userlists, enhanced scripting, and more). The main difference from
+other clients is that it implements many useful features that you would
+normally find in a script, thus making it faster than such scripts
+paired up with ircII.
 
-It also has many unique features, such as three-line status bars, CDCC (which
-has reget/resend ability), and its environment is highly customizable.
+It also has many unique features, such as three-line status bars, CDCC
+(which has reget/resend ability), and its environment is highly
+customizable.
 
-WWW: http://www.scrollz.com/
+WWW: http://www.scrollz.org/
